title: megalastrum glabrius
intro: Megalastrum glabrius, a type of fern found in Central and South America, is a species of plant in the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Megalastrum glabrius are believed to include reducing pain and swelling, as well as treating skin conditions and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Megalastrum glabrius typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
